title: fix(audio): preserve filename + accept usage.seconds for OVH Whisper
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Hearing you loud and clear
gist.blurb: Fixed a bug where our Whisper audio transcription was getting confused by missing file extensions and renamed usage fields. Your voice memos are safe with us again!
gist.summary: Resolved OVH Whisper transcription crashes by preserving file extensions in FormData and supporting the updated usage.seconds response field.
gist.impact: Audio transcription requests will no longer fail with 500 errors or crash due to missing duration metadata.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing cute chunky headphones, holding a glowing audio cassette tape or interacting with a retro boombox to represent audio transcription being fixed.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing chunky retro headphones, holding a glowing audio cassette tape. A retro boombox sits nearby on a wooden desk, emitting soft musical notes. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
